Council regarding a rezoning of the property legally described as First [CONTINUED]

Analysis: The Comprehensive Plan/Future Land Use Map identifies the subject property as being located within the Place Focused Commercial development pattern. Characteristics of this development pattern include providing minor level density, scale, and a mix of uses. Such uses include a blend of dining, shopping, entertainment, and social gathering spaces. It is not believed that a massage salon would complement adjacent retail and shopping uses within the shopping center.

items.text: Consider and make a recommendation to Town Council on a Major Final Plat for the Knights [PASSED 4-0]
Director Wicks provided a presentation on the item. The Commission discussed the item and considered the final plat.
Commissioner Lewis motioned to recommend approval to Town Council for a Major Final Plat for the Knights Ridge private subdivision, as presented. Commissioner Miersma seconded the motion.

sfr_items.text: Commissioner Lewis motioned to recommend approval to Town Council for a Major Final Plat for the Knights Ridge private subdivision, as presented. Commissioner Miersma seconded the motion.

items.text: During the previous MDD meeting on April 7, 2026, Jeremy Blad with Valley Quest Design provided a presentation on a draft version of the Front Street Small Area Plan. Notable comments included clarification on the names of historic buildings in the area, the proximity of the train tracks, the location of a proposed you-pick farm, and future zoning change requirements. Exhibit A is the final version of the small area plan ready for consideration and approval by the MDD.

items.text: ZONING COMMISSION MEETING. a. *PUBLIC HEARING* CONSIDER A REQUEST TO REZONE ±10.0 ACRES
REGIONAL COMMERCIAL (RC) DISTRICT LOCATED AT 1519 WEST KILPATRICK c. *PUBLIC HEARING* CONSIDER A REQUEST TO REZONE ±0.25 ACRES
Item Title: *PUBLIC HEARING* CONSIDER A REQUEST TO REZONE ±10.0 ACRES
Item Description: The applicant, Marshall Weatherby, requests to rezone approximately 10 acres of undeveloped land located along the west side of North Main Street, approximately 0.25 miles south of
Background & Technical Analysis: The applicant proposes to rezone the subject property from Industrial

Site Development: According to the Letter of Intent provided by the applicant, the property owner intends to develop the subject property with a multi-tenant office and warehouse development. If this rezoning request is approved, future development of the property will require approval of subdivision plats and a detailed site plan in accordance with the City’s development regulations. The Zoning Ordinance requires enhanced landscaping and building design standards within the CI District as compared to the existing
Future Land Use Plan: This property is designated as Commercial on the City’s Future Land Use Plan.
Letter of Intent for Rezoning Application
Re: Letter of Intent – Request for Rezoning from Industrial to Commercial/Industrial Flex [APPROVED]
I am writing to formally submit this Letter of Intent in support of a rezoning application for a

10-acre tract inside of 4319 N Main St Cleburne Tx, currently zoned Industrial. We are requesting approval to rezone the property to Commercial/Industrial Flex District to better align with our proposed development plans. [APPROVED]

The intent of this rezoning request is to develop the property into a high-quality office and warehouse facility. The proposed development will consist of modern office/warehouse buildings designed to support a range of commercial and light industrial uses. These facilities are intended to attract reputable tenants, provide functional and flexible space, and contribute positively to the local business environment. [APPROVED]

We believe that rezoning to Commercial/Industrial Flex District is appropriate for this location and consistent with the City’s long-term planning goals. The proposed development will support economic growth, create job opportunities, and enhance the overall utility and value of the property.
Thank you for your time and consideration of this request. We respectfully ask for your support in approving the proposed rezoning.
Cleburne, TX 76033 Future Land Use Map
Future Land Use Plan: This site is designated as Medium-Density Residential on the City’s Future Land
